title: Welcome to my new Portfolio!
content: I've just migrated my portfolio to this new React + Tailwind application. It's incredibly fast, deeply optimized, and now hosts my personal micro-blog! Expect updates on my systems analysis, Java backend configurations, and AI engineering.

title: Thoughts on Modern Java Architectural Patterns
content: Exploring service orchestration inside Spring Boot with Google Cloud functions. Moving logic into manageable, highly scalable modules is more important than ever for backend performance. I recently posted a deep dive on how this looks in practice.
